title: Quick Coordinates Copy
description: Easily copy your in-game coordinates to share with friends.
body: # Quick Coords Copy Allows you to quickly copy your in-game coordinates to send to your friends! ![](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/838048982873538572/1006522579223330866/unknown.png) ## Usage When in-game, press the `Copy Coordinates` key (` by default) and the coordinates will be copied to your keyboard. ## Config ```json5 { // The format of the string that gets copied. Use $x, $y and $z as placeholders. "format": "Coordinates: $x, $y, $z" } ```
